title: trifolium howellii var. latifolium
intro: Trifolium howellii var. latifolium, also known as Howell's clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium howellii var. latifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
